node_1: optimal transport trust region policy optimization (ot-trpo)
edge: We introduce OT-TRPO to address the lack of a suitable algorithm for continuous state-action spaces.
OT-TRPO provides a one-dimensional dual formulation to bypass the need for infinite-dimensional optimization.
The optimal policy update is derived analytically from the solution of the dual problem.
OT-TRPO implicitly characterizes optimal transport costs and maps through the dual formulation.
The paper presents an experimental evaluation of OT-TRPO across various control tasks.
